_meta.description: sCure Error & Warning Definitions. CS team can edit descriptions, troubleshooting steps, and support links. Error codes and severity levels are system-defined and should not be changed.

errors.title: Laser Temperature too High
errors.description: The laser temperature has exceeded the safe operating limit. This may be due to cooling failure or excessive usage.

errors.title: Chamber Overheat
errors.description: The chamber temperature has exceeded the maximum safe limit of 85°C. The heater has been automatically shut off.
troubleshooting: Allow the chamber to cool down naturally
Verify the heater relay is functioning

errors.title: System Motor Failure
errors.description: The damper motor has failed to respond. This prevents proper airflow control during the curing process.
troubleshooting: Contact support if motor is silent

errors.title: Door Lock Failure
errors.description: The door lock mechanism has failed. The curing process cannot start without a secure door lock.

errors.title: UV LED Failure
errors.description: One or more UV LEDs have failed the diagnostic test. Curing quality may be compromised.

errors.title: N₂ Pressure Critical
errors.description: Nitrogen line pressure has dropped below the minimum required level during an active cure process.
troubleshooting: Check the N₂ supply tank level
Inspect the gas line for leaks

errors.title: Power Supply Fault
errors.description: The main power supply voltage is outside the acceptable range. System operation may be unreliable.
troubleshooting: Inspect the internal power supply unit

errors.title: Communication Error
errors.description: The control board has lost communication with the hardware interface. No hardware commands can be executed.
troubleshooting: Verify the control board LED indicators

errors.title: Filter Needs Cleaning
errors.description: The air filter has reached its recommended service interval. Cleaning or replacement is recommended to maintain optimal performance.
troubleshooting: Remove and inspect the air filter
Reset the filter timer in Settings

errors.title: Fan Speed Low
errors.description: The cooling fan is running below expected RPM. This may indicate dust buildup or bearing wear.
troubleshooting: Replace fan if RPM remains low

errors.title: N₂ Pressure Low
errors.description: Nitrogen line pressure is below the recommended level. Nitrogen mode may not activate properly.
troubleshooting: Verify pressure is at least 6 bar
Check for slow leaks in the gas line

errors.title: High Lead On Time
errors.description: The UV LED modules have exceeded 500 hours of operation. Performance may gradually decrease.
troubleshooting: Run LED diagnostic to verify output

errors.title: Software Update Available
errors.description: A new software version is available. Update to get the latest features and bug fixes.
troubleshooting: Download the update from the support portal
Copy the .scu file to a USB drive

errors.title: Network Disconnected
errors.description: The ethernet connection has been lost. Remote monitoring and cloud features are unavailable.
troubleshooting: Verify the router/switch is powered on

errors.title: Door Sensor Misaligned
errors.description: The door sensor readings are intermittent. The door may not be sealing properly.
troubleshooting: Open and close the door firmly
